description_long: This is a modern, twin-propeller airplane with a sleek, streamlined fuselage and a low-wing configuration. The wings are slightly swept and feature upward-angled winglets at the tips, enhancing aerodynamic efficiency. The aircraft has a distinctive H-tail design with twin vertical stabilizers connected by a horizontal stabilizer. The landing gear is tricycle-type, with two main wheels under the wings and a single nose wheel, all of which appear to be retractable. The cockpit is positioned at the forward end of the fuselage and is enclosed, with multiple windows along the side indicating a multi-seat passenger cabin. The exterior is primarily white with red and gray accent markings on the nose, wingtips, and tail surfaces.
description: A sleek, twin-propeller airplane with a low-wing, swept design, H-tail, and forward enclosed cockpit, finished in white with red and gray accents.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated fuselage, low-mounted swept wings with winglets, and visible landing gear beneath the wings and nose.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the twin propellers, H-tail configuration with dual vertical stabilizers, and the full wingspan with upward-angled winglets.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the other side of the fuselage, wing, and landing gear arrangement.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the pointed nose, forward cockpit windows, twin propellers, and the broad wings with winglets.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, slightly swept wings with upward-angled winglets and moderate dihedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Twin turboprop engines mounted on the wings.
attribute_tail_design: H-tail configuration with twin vertical stabilizers connected by a horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with two main units and one nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multi-seat configuration and multiple side windows.
